title: About half of Americans continue to say Trump administration is doing ‘too much’ on deportations
summary_en: The share saying the administration is doing too little to deport immigrants living in the country illegally has risen slightly, mainly driven by Republicans.
title_cn: [待翻译] About half of Americans continue to say Trump administration is doing ‘too much’ on deportations

title: Trump Loses Ground on Several Personal Traits as Approval Rating Slips
summary_en: A majority of Americans (56%) say the overall level of ethics and honesty in the federal government has fallen over the course of Trump’s term.
title_cn: [待翻译] Trump Loses Ground on Several Personal Traits as Approval Rating Slips

title: Americans remain critical of Trump administration’s approach to Iran
summary_en: 62% of Americans disapprove of Trump’s handling of the military action against Iran, and 59% say the U.S. made the wrong decision in using military force.
title_cn: [待翻译] Americans remain critical of Trump administration’s approach to Iran
